research_basis: Astronomy and astronomical observation, astrology history and cultural belief systems, archetype psychology and personality theory, mythological symbolism and cultural traditions, gemstone properties and mineral science, chronobiology and seasonal patterns, neuroscience of belief systems and pattern recognition

metadata.research_alignment: Astronomy fundamentals including ecliptic, precession of equinoxes, planetary orbital mechanics, and apparent retrograde motion; Astrology history spanning Babylonian origins through Hellenistic, Islamic Golden Age, Renaissance, and modern developments; Archetype psychology and Jungian personality theory; Symbolic systems and cultural belief systems across Western, Vedic, and Chinese traditions; Gemstone mineralogy, crystallography, and spectroscopic identification; Chronobiology and seasonal pattern recognition; Neuroscience and cognitive bias research (Barnum effect, apophenia, confirmation bias); Statistical analysis of astrological correlations; Phenomenological and social constructionist approaches to belief systems; Quantum mechanics and fundamental physics frameworks

coverage_details.kids_4_under: Zodiacal animal symbols with recognizable characteristics, birthstone colors and simple properties, basic planetary concepts (Sun, Moon), zodiacal elements as simple categories (fire, water, earth, air), sensory engagement with gemstone descriptions
coverage_details.kids_10_under: Zodiacal constellations and astronomical positioning, birthstone historical beliefs and cultural significance, zodiacal qualities (cardinal, fixed, mutable), astrological houses and basic chart concepts, connections between zodiacal elements and personality traits
coverage_details.teenagers: Historical development of astrology from Babylonian through modern times, astrological mechanics (aspects, cusps, planetary rulers, retrograde), Jungian psychology and archetypal connections, psychological bias research (Barnum effect, confirmation bias), mineralogy and gemstone composition, sidereal vs tropical zodiac differences, Saturn return and major astrological transitions
coverage_details.adults: Scholarly perspectives on astrology as cultural belief system and historical episteme, detailed history of astrological theory (Ptolemy, al-Farabi, John Dee), phenomenological and social constructionist analysis of meaning-making, epistemological critique and statistical evidence against astrological prediction, psychological mechanisms underlying belief (collective unconscious, pattern recognition), mineralogical science and advanced gemstone classification, neurobiology of belief systems, postmodern theoretical frameworks
coverage_details.no_humanity: Babylonian mathematical systems (sexagesimal base-60), Copernican heliocentrism vs geocentric models, computational algorithms for precession and planetary position calculation, spectroscopic and crystallographic analysis methods, spherical trigonometry and celestial coordinate systems, statistical modeling and hypothesis testing, machine learning approaches to personality-zodiac correlation, quantum field theory implications, differential equations for cyclical patterns, tensor mathematics for gravitational effects, information theory and entropy calculations, topological invariants in symbolic systems
